propositions: An audit identified ~9 anti-pattern 'change-detector' tests that assert against source text, private structure, or mere existence rather than behavior.
Several documented contracts lack behavioral regression tests and must gain deterministic coverage.
Two P0 findings (index.lock stale-reclaim TOCTOU and detached-HEAD local-ahead preservation) need behavioral regression tests plus hardening of the real production race.
Change-detector tests must be replaced by behavioral tests, deleted as redundant, or explicitly re-justified as supplemental structural guards.
Two documentation-vs-code drifts (Jira link-sync inventory; dual-lock portability lifecycle) must be reconciled for contract-to-test traceability.
New concurrency/race tests must be deterministic using barriers or instrumented seams rather than sleep-timing races.
